organization: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited

benefits.name: In-Patient Hospitalization Expenses
benefits.description: Covers room rent, boarding, and nursing charges restricted to Single AC Private Room.

benefits.name: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred before hospitalization.

benefits.name: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Covers medical expenses incurred after hospitalization.

benefits.name: Outpatient Treatment Expenses
benefits.description: Covers expenses incurred for medically necessary treatment of diseases.

benefits.name: Recovery Benefit
benefits.description: Covers sum insured if hospitalization exceeds 10 continuous days.

benefits.name: Reinstatement of Sum Insured
benefits.description: Reinstates sum insured for subsequent hospitalization during the policy year.

benefits.name: Vector Borne Diseases – Benefit
benefits.description: Covers hospitalization due to vector-borne diseases.

exclusions.name: 30-day waiting period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date are excluded.

exclusions.name: Rest Cure, rehabilitation and respite care
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any admission primarily for enforced bed rest and not for receiving treatment.

exclusions.name: Unproven Treatments
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any unproven treatment, services, and supplies.

exclusions.name: Outpatient Treatment
exclusions.description: Any treatment taken on outpatient basis.

exclusions.name: Non-Medical expenses
exclusions.description: Non-medical expenses such as food charges, laundry charges, etc.
